creator: tmclaugh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks.  And yes I know about sudo 1.7.0 but I'm hesitant to 
update the port to it.  It's a big change and I'd rather wait for a p1 
or p2 release to come out.  I'm also not sure if any OSes are even using 
it yet.
